theme: red throne room with crimson banners, ornate throne, execution block, iron cage, pit backdrop

throne_crimson_ornate.usage: centrepiece rear-stage throne, the dominant focal landmark

block_execution_wood.usage: low execution block floor prop, implied threat

pillar_crimson_banner.usage: banner pillar repeated flanking the throne

cage_iron_floor.usage: iron cage prop, corner dressing or mid-stage hazard hint
